# Acme Catalog

> Agent Content Tree for Acme Catalog.

## Index

- [Acme Catalog](http://localhost:4321/): Acme Catalog — 500 products grouped into 8 categories.
- [Footwear](http://localhost:4321/c/footwear/): Footwear — 62 products grouped under the footwear category.
- [Apparel](http://localhost:4321/c/apparel/): Apparel — 63 products grouped under the apparel category.
- [Kitchen](http://localhost:4321/c/kitchen/): Kitchen — 63 products grouped under the kitchen category.
- [Tools](http://localhost:4321/c/tools/): Tools — 63 products grouped under the tools category.
- [Outdoor](http://localhost:4321/c/outdoor/): Outdoor — 63 products grouped under the outdoor category.
- [Office](http://localhost:4321/c/office/): Office — 62 products grouped under the office category.
- [Lighting](http://localhost:4321/c/lighting/): Lighting — 62 products grouped under the lighting category.
- [Audio](http://localhost:4321/c/audio/): Audio — 62 products grouped under the audio category.
